shortFormVideo.hook: Most citation work fails because the business details are not connected to the page buyers actually land on.
shortFormVideo.script: Open on a messy directory/search-results view. Cut to a clean checklist: Google Business Profile, homepage promise, service page, reviews, local mentions, and internal links. Explain that authority comes from consistent proof, not bulk directory spam. Close on the EB28 blog URL and the Melbourne Web Studio project brief.
shotList: Search result or citation list with mismatched details blurred
Google Business Profile and homepage consistency checklist
Internal links from homepage, Melbourne Web Studio, and related local SEO articles
Final frame with eb28.co/blog/ and Start Project CTA
